title: Upon Crab. Epig.
content:
Crab faces gowns with sundry furs; 'tis known
    He keeps the fox fur for to face his own.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Crab. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
